reference: Hi, I just want to know what is wrong with me. I feel heat inside my body. I feel exhausted. I have lost weight. I try to eat, but it seems like I haven't gained any weight. I have a health history of hepatitis B, and I haven't received any treatment yet. One time, I had a blood test to count the virus in my blood. The doctor said there are many viruses in one milliliter of blood. Are the above symptoms caused by hepatitis B?
text: Hi, I just want to know what is wrong with me. I feel heat inside my body. I feel exhausted. I have lost weight. I try to eat, but it seems like I haven't gained in weight. I have a health history of hepatitis B, but I haven't received any treatment yet. One time, I had a blood test to count the virus in my blood. The doctor said there are many viruses in one milliliter of blood. Are the above symptoms caused by hepatitis B?
